## v1.0.28 — Setup Hub progress UI, packaging fixes, WSL stability

### Setup Hub
- **In-app install progress modal** — live log tail, phase bar, and finish confirmation for Install all tools / Update all addons / per-addon updates (replaces silent detached CMD-only flow in the app UI)
- **Windows embeddable Python pip bootstrap** — patch `python311._pth` before `get-pip.py` so managed venv creation no longer fails with "No module named pip"

### WSL local render
- Portable `scripts/wsl-*.sh` helpers with shared `wsl-paths.sh`
- Native T5 ckpts symlink (`wsl-prepare-native-ckpts.sh`) to avoid drvfs SIGBUS on `/mnt/c`
- Low-VRAM Open-Sora patch for 12 GB GPUs (`wsl-patch-open-sora-low-vram.py`)
- README WSL section expanded

### Video Prep & production (v1.0.26)
- Video Prep Agent chat orchestration, beat-sync suggestions, persistent session memory
- End-to-end **Produce video** pipeline with WSL routing and FFmpeg assemble

### Packaging
- Ship `opensora_inference_support.py`, `run-music-video-sync.py`, and `opensora-stub-paths/**` in the Windows installer (Director render + music-video sync)

Existing installs should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
